Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
134 
RSDNTL_TRTMT_FAC_TXNMY_IND 
LABEL: 
Residential Treatment Facility Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the residential treatment facility provider 
category; ever in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: RSDNTL_TRTMT_FAC_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: RSDNTL_TRTMT_FAC_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1
